titleEn: Opportunity — Grand Tower for Sale, Punta Pacífica Apartment for Sale

children.text: Secondary balcony in the master bedroom
Includes full set of white goods

Grand Tower – Punta Pacífica
Exclusive residential building located in one of Panama City's most privileged areas. Grand Tower stands out as one of the few buildings in Panama with an integrated commercial plaza, offering the convenience of shops, cafes such as Foodie and The Coffee Bean, pharmacies, and some of Panama's best restaurants within walking distance.

The building offers full amenities, including pool, gym, social area, event room, children's play area, sports court, and 24/7 security, providing a comfortable, practical, and family-friendly lifestyle in the heart of Punta Pacífica.
Its strategic location, near Multiplaza, hospitals, supermarkets, and main roads, makes it an excellent option both for living and investing.

titleEn: Río Mar — San Carlos (Beachfront) Apartment for Sale
Veracruz — Large Oceanfront Lot in Bique Beach House for Sale

children.text:
Unique investment opportunity in one of the most promising areas of Panama's Pacific coast.

998 continuous hectares for sale, located in Bique, Arraiján, with direct access from Veracruz, Panamá Pacífico, and the Arraiján Highway. Just 25 minutes from the city.

The property features:
• 4 km of beachfront with maritime access.
• Rivers, internal roads, three-phase electricity, and potable water.
• Soil studies and drilling that confirm abundant basalt and high-quality non-metallic minerals.
• Active concession for mining operations
• Land with no restrictions

Thanks to its strategic location near the Panama Canal, its size, and its natural resources, the land is ideal for:
• Port, logistics, or industrial development.
• High-end residential, tourism, or beach projects.
• Quarry operations or non-metallic mining.
• Large-scale agricultural or ecological initiatives.

Ideal for institutional investors, real estate investment funds, logistics companies, or developers with strategic vision.

Full price and dossier available upon confidential request.

The building features full amenities including pool, gym, social area, event room, children's areas, sports court, and 24/7 security — ideal for enjoying with family in total comfort.
Its excellent location offers quick access to Multiplaza, hospitals, supermarkets, restaurants, and the city's main roads, making it an excellent option both for living and investing.
